It is the number one platform for containers; from Docker to Kubernetes to LXD, Ubuntu can run your containers at scale.
Fast, secure and simple, Ubuntu powers millions of PCs worldwide.

It is the number one platform for containers; from Docker to Kubernetes to LXD, Ubuntu can run your containers at scale.
Fast, secure and simple, Ubuntu powers millions of PCs worldwide.
